title: SpatialMemory
description: This dataset contains electroencephalography (EEG) recordings from a visuo-spatial working memory task designed to investigate oscillatory neural dynamics during sequence encoding and recall across age groups. Participants performed a computerized spatial span task while EEG was recorded to examine theta and gamma band oscillations and their phase-amplitude coupling. The study aims to elucidate the neural mechanisms supporting visuo-spatial working memory for sequences and characterize potential changes in these processes during healthy cognitive aging.
methods_description: EEG recordings were collected during a computerized spatial span task. Participants encoded and recalled sequences of spatial locations while neural oscillatory activity in the theta and gamma frequency bands was measured. Analysis focused on item-level oscillatory dynamics during both encoding and recall phases, with examination of gamma band power and theta-gamma phase-amplitude coupling across serial positions.
